text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I are on our way back from buying
new cleats.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, I remember that shop...
choice_data_list: That's the store where you helped out that time.
That's the store where you helped out that time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sure brings back memories. Working there was
pretty fun.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Umm, excuse me... Are you by any chance Oguri
Cap?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um, yes...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: We're huge fans—always cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, ummm...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I'm happy to hear that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Your support really means a lot. So... thank you
for cheering for me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Of course! And thanks for always being so
inspiring!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Good luck in all your future races!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Right. Thank you again for your support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might still be slightly awkward, but Oguri Cap
is much more relaxed when it comes to interacting
with her fans now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keeping you waiting.
choice_data_list: Looks like all the practice has paid off.
Looks like all the practice has paid off.
You've grown.
You've grown.

Have you gotten used to being around people
your age?

Have you gotten used to being around people
your age?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keeping you waiting.
choice_data_list: Looks like all the practice has paid off.
Looks like all the practice has paid off.
You've grown.
You've grown.

Have you gotten used to being around people
your age?

Have you gotten used to being around people
your age?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...It's all thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If not for your advice, I don't know if I would've
been able to talk to my fans at all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Having you by my side gave me the confidence I
needed. I really appreciate it.
choice_data_list: Any time.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, I told Tama about how I helped out at
that store.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And guess what she said? She called you "Poppa
Trainer."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And guess what she said? She called you "Momma
Trainer."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Should I call you "Poppa" from now on?
choice_data_list: N-no need to fix what isn't broken!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Should I call you "Momma" from now on?
choice_data_list: N-no need to fix what isn't broken!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling pleased that Oguri Cap has placed so
much trust in me, we start making our way back.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I have? Heh...
choice_data_list: What's up?
What's up?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You sounded like Shige just now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You sounded like Tome just now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I always found it strange how I feel so calm
talking to you...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I think I know why. You remind me of
Shige—actually, no... You remind me of home.
choice_data_list: Is that the vibe I give off?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I think I know why. You remind me of
Tome—actually, no... You remind me of home.
choice_data_list: Is that the vibe I give off?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'd love for you to visit my hometown one
day. I'm sure you'd like it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm flooded with pride for how far Oguri Cap has
come—not just in her racing, but as a person. If
only everyone else could witness this moment.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm still working on it, but I think I've made
some good progress. Hey, do you mind if I ask
you something?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If I ever need any more advice, do you think it'd
be okay for me to come to you?
choice_data_list: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Thanks. I'm glad to know that I can rely on you
for more than just racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reminded of our undeniable bond, the two of us
begin making our way back.
